reason: Shared coding and project lineage rules apply across backend, desktop, docs, and workflow defaults.
Project is a derivative of upstream OpenAI Symphony and must preserve the GitHub-specific direction.
Mandatory quality rules for all code changes.
Desktop TypeScript changes must keep explicit safe types.
Backend runtime, config, runner, GitHub tools, and documentation changes.
Dynamic tool and runtime failures must surface structured errors.
Token injection and diagnostics changes must not leak secrets.
Backend quality checks and import/structure conventions.
Desktop Settings and Help UI changes.
React state/update changes must avoid known pitfalls.
Desktop TypeScript and UI quality constraints.
Upstream autonomy model and local gap analysis for implementation.
